CREATE TABLE t_flatten_tuple(t Tuple(t1 Nested(a UInt32, s String), b UInt32, t2 Tuple(k String, v UInt32))) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE t_complex (data Tuple(a Nested(x UInt32, y String), b Nested(u String, v UInt32))) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE t_multi (id UInt32, info Tuple(data Tuple(a Int, b Nested(c Int, d String))) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT flattenTuple(info) FROM t_multi WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE t_join (id UInt32, obj Tuple(a Nested(x UInt32, y String), b UInt32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT flattenTuple(obj) FROM t_join WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM t_join WHERE obj.1 > 100);
CREATE TABLE t_aggregate (group_id UInt32, metrics Tuple(sum UInt32, avg Float64)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT flattenTuple(metrics) FROM t_aggregate GROUP BY group_id;
CREATE TABLE t_nested (a Tuple(b Tuple(c UInt32, d String), e UInt32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT flattenTuple(tuple(a), Tuple(b Nested(c UInt32, d String))) FROM (SELECT 1 AS a, [(2, 'text3'), (3, 'text4')] AS b) AS sub;
